node.description:
__Height:__ 170 cm

Alisa Mikhailovna Kujou is a model student who boasts the highest grades in her school year and the student council accountant. Her nickname is Alya and she is the younger biological sister of Maria Mikhailovna Kujou. She is one of the two most beautiful girls in her school year, and is called the "Solitary Princess" because she is perceived as very cold and distant.

Alya is very hardworking to the point she loathes people who don't put in effort. When she was younger, she was disappointed with the lack of motivation from her classmates and this made her realize how ignorant they were, which created an unconscious condescension within her. Once she realized that, she drew a line in order to avoid any conflict with those around her, making her feel distant and reserved to others. For better or worse she doesn't rely on anyone.

Masachika Kuze is an unmotivated underachiever who routinely stays up late indulging in his nerdy hobbies. The girl who sits next to him in class, Alisa, constantly gets after him. While his grade may be on the lower end, he actually understands Russian because of his paternal grandfather, who was a big lover of Russian Culture.

Mariya Mikhailovna Kujou is a second-year student and the student council secretary. Her nickname is Masha and she is the older biological sister of Alisa Mikhailovna Kujou. She is one of the two beauties from her school year. She is popular for her looks and motherly gentle aura. She is called the "Madonna" of the school because of this.

Masha purposefully acts like an airhead around Alya because she doesn't want to compete with her. She acts like this because she loves her sister very much. In reality she is very mature and serious deep down inside. Masachika finds it very hard to read her because of this.

~!Masha turns out to be Maa-chan, Masachika's first love. They were childhood friends and often played together until Masha had to leave for Russia. Masachika never recognised Maa-chan in high school because she had blonde hair and sapphire eyes when she was younger. She continues to love Masachika even now but takes a step back because of her younger sister's feelings for him.!~
First-year high school student. Sayaka's best friend since childhood.
From Masachika’s view, he was his friend since middle school.

Ayano is an expressionless maid of the Suou household. She's the sort of devoted servant who has boundless love for her master, and she's dedicated herself to serving [Yuki](https://anilist.co/character/243404). She often has no presence and vanishes into thin air.

~!Ayano used to originally serve Masachika. She still has boundless love for him and treats him as her master too.!~
He is a friend of Masachika since middle school.

__Height:__ 150 cm

Yuki Suou is a proper young lady from a family of former nobility. She is the student council publicist and former middle school student council president. She is one of the two most beautiful girls in her school year, and is called the "Noble Princess". She is childhood friends with Masachika.
Chisaki Sarashina is a second year student and the vice president of the student council of her high school.
He is the charismatic student council president leading the current student council of the high school section. He is currently in his second year of high school.
She is the current public morals committee member who competed with Yuki for the position of student council president in the middle school.
